description_long: This is a compact, robust axe with a short, slightly curved handle made of wood, reinforced with dark bands and a textured grip area. The head of the axe is forged from metal, featuring a broad, wedge-shaped blade with a slightly worn, matte finish and a pronounced cutting edge. The blade is securely mounted to the handle with visible metal fasteners and a reinforced collar, suggesting durability and heavy-duty use. The poll (rear) of the axe head is squared and solid, suitable for hammering tasks. The handle shows signs of ergonomic shaping, with a thicker base and a subtle curve for improved grip and control. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with muted earth tones and a rugged, practical design suitable for urban maintenance or emergency use.
description: A rugged, short-handled axe with a broad metal blade and reinforced wooden grip, designed for durability and utility. The axe features a matte, worn finish and visible fasteners securing the blade.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the broad blade, reinforced collar, and curved wooden handle with grip bands.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow edge of the blade and the alignment of the handle, with the reinforced collar and fasteners visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the blade's profile, handle curvature, and grip details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the poll of the axe head and the back of the handle, with the grip and reinforcement bands visible.
attribute_handle_type: Short, slightly curved wooden handle with dark grip bands, ergonomic shaping, and a rounded rectangular cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, wedge-shaped steel blade with a single cutting edge, squared poll, and reinforced collar; matte, slightly worn finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and pinned mounting with visible fasteners and reinforced collar.
